_meta.description: Valuation metrics per company. Populated as data is gathered. All fields optional — enrich incrementally. Fields: ticker, ev_ebitda, p_nav, fcf_yield_pct, capex_cycle_pos, mkt_cap_bn, price_usd, last_updated, notes.
_meta.instructions: Update this file after each earnings season or when conducting company-specific research. Link to annotations.json via ticker key.

metrics.notes: Magnet ramp capex heavy near-term; FCF inflection expected post-Fort Worth ramp.
Seadrift TX capex phase. Margin inflection when Kalgoorlie + TX reach steady state.
HALEU deployment contract with DOE is milestone trigger. Revenue lumpy.
McArthur River/Cigar Lake at full capacity. Westinghouse 49% stake adds fuel services exposure.
Track premium/discount to NAV vs. spot U3O8. Physical trust — no FCF concept applies.
AI PPA pipeline is key earnings driver to model. Watch contracted vs. merchant mix shift.
Backlog-to-revenue ratio is the key metric. Watch backlog growth vs. burn rate quarterly.
Electrical segment margin expansion from transformer pricing power. Data center power fastest-growing.
Gas turbine + offshore wind + grid solutions. Watch order intake across all three segments.
Lowest-cost producer = highest margin leverage to Cu price moves.
Grasberg ore body transition complete. Capex cycle normalizing.
Streaming — zero capex. Track GEOs (gold-equivalent ounces) guidance and new deal pipeline.
Streaming — zero capex. Watch Ag/Au stream volumes and new streaming deal announcements.
Track contracted vs. spot cargo mix. Stage 3 expansion in ramp. SPA pipeline important.
Li price trough — watch Li carbonate spot as lead indicator. Kings Mountain is the structural inflection.
Chile policy risk (Codelco JV) monitoring required. Lowest-cost brine advantage durable.
Pre-revenue development stage. Permitting decision is the binary catalyst.
Bisie mine producing. Track quarterly tin production and realized price vs. LME.
Watch desal contract win rate + industrial segment (defense/mining water) growth rate.
On-site plant contract signings = leading indicator. Track new project backlog + TSMC fab wins.
Defense contract renewals are the key catalyst. Small cap — liquidity risk aware.
Track potash price cycle + retail distribution margin. Jansen Stage 1 adds supply overhang.
Crack spread is primary earnings driver — track Gulf Coast 321 crack spread weekly.
Gold royalties. Track GEO deliveries + new royalty deal pipeline. No operational risk.
